Complaint Received

This is an official report of an unannounced visit/investigation of a complaint received in our office on 02/08/2021 and conducted by Evaluator Karen McGee.

Facility

COMPLAINT CONTROL NUMBER: 32-CR-20210208082323

FACILITY NAME: VICTORY FAMILY SERVICES

FACILITY NUMBER: 157806097

VISIT DATE: 10/08/2021

ALLEGATION(S):

- Foster parents made inappropriate comments to foster child.

INVESTIGATION FINDINGS:

On October 08, 2021, at 12:30 PM, Licensing Program Analyst Karen McGee conducted an unannounced follow-up complaint inspection to deliver findings for the complaint allegation above.

Finding: Unsubstantiated

A copy of this report and appeal rights was provided to the facility representative.
